## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Poplar Homes and fwd.digital for content marketing and SEO services.](https://fathom.video/share/qfkkxYk3t2bP4LVLiEMMUbegpjzdZW3o?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital offers a sophisticated AI-driven content creation service with human expert oversight](https://fathom.video/share/qfkkxYk3t2bP4LVLiEMMUbegpjzdZW3o?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [Their approach includes detailed content strategy, custom knowledge bases, and scalable content production](https://fathom.video/share/qfkkxYk3t2bP4LVLiEMMUbegpjzdZW3o?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [Potential partnership to be explored further, pending discussions with Poplar Homes' potential new partner](https://fathom.video/share/qfkkxYk3t2bP4LVLiEMMUbegpjzdZW3o?tab=summary&timestamp=1580.0)

## Topics

### Poplar Homes Overview

  - [Property management and technology company headquartered in Bay Area](https://fathom.video/share/qfkkxYk3t2bP4LVLiEMMUbegpjzdZW3o?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Manages \~10,000 homes across 24 markets in 13-14 states](https://fathom.video/share/qfkkxYk3t2bP4LVLiEMMUbegpjzdZW3o?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [Target customers: independent landlords and small real estate investors (1-10 properties)](https://fathom.video/share/qfkkxYk3t2bP4LVLiEMMUbegpjzdZW3o?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [Growth primarily through organic outbound/inbound sales and marketing](https://fathom.video/share/qfkkxYk3t2bP4LVLiEMMUbegpjzdZW3o?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)

### fwd.digital's Approach

  - [AI-powered content creation with human expert oversight](https://fathom.video/share/qfkkxYk3t2bP4LVLiEMMUbegpjzdZW3o?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [Custom "Content OS" with topic clusters and opportunity backlogs](https://fathom.video/share/qfkkxYk3t2bP4LVLiEMMUbegpjzdZW3o?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [Robust workflows (100-200 steps) for article generation, including research and editing](https://fathom.video/share/qfkkxYk3t2bP4LVLiEMMUbegpjzdZW3o?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)
  - [Capability to handle high volume (hundreds of pages/month) and complex content needs](https://fathom.video/share/qfkkxYk3t2bP4LVLiEMMUbegpjzdZW3o?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)

### Content Strategy and Implementation

  - [12-week launch process, including research, kickoff, and strategy presentation](https://fathom.video/share/qfkkxYk3t2bP4LVLiEMMUbegpjzdZW3o?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Calibration process with sample content creation in early weeks](https://fathom.video/share/qfkkxYk3t2bP4LVLiEMMUbegpjzdZW3o?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)
  - [Typically begin publishing by week 3-4](https://fathom.video/share/qfkkxYk3t2bP4LVLiEMMUbegpjzdZW3o?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)
  - [Adaptable to various content needs (e.g., microsites, localized content)](https://fathom.video/share/qfkkxYk3t2bP4LVLiEMMUbegpjzdZW3o?tab=summary&timestamp=1053.0)

### SEO and Content Marketing Landscape

  - [Discussion on effectiveness of microsite strategy vs. building domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/qfkkxYk3t2bP4LVLiEMMUbegpjzdZW3o?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
  - [Importance of becoming "AI-native" and scaling efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/qfkkxYk3t2bP4LVLiEMMUbegpjzdZW3o?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Building custom knowledge bases for long-term competitive advantage](https://fathom.video/share/qfkkxYk3t2bP4LVLiEMMUbegpjzdZW3o?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)
  - [Potential for AI-driven outbound marketing and unique content generation](https://fathom.video/share/qfkkxYk3t2bP4LVLiEMMUbegpjzdZW3o?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Chuck to introduce Marcel to his counterpart at potential partner company](https://fathom.video/share/qfkkxYk3t2bP4LVLiEMMUbegpjzdZW3o?tab=summary&timestamp=1580.0)
  - [Marcel to follow up with recording and additional details](https://fathom.video/share/qfkkxYk3t2bP4LVLiEMMUbegpjzdZW3o?tab=summary&timestamp=1747.0)
  - [Potential in-person meeting in San Francisco/Oakland area if interest persists](https://fathom.video/share/qfkkxYk3t2bP4LVLiEMMUbegpjzdZW3o?tab=summary&timestamp=1756.0)
